name: buddy-stickers
description: Generate personalized Telegram sticker packs for your Claude Code buddy. 18 species x 12 unique emotions. Bold outlines, transparent backgrounds, auto-created sticker packs.

openrouter_api_key.description: OpenRouter API key for image generation. Sign up at https://openrouter.ai (free $5 credit)

telegram_bot_token.description: Telegram Bot token from @BotFather (for creating sticker packs). Optional — skip if you only want local PNG files

telegram_chat.description: Telegram chat/bot to send stickers to (e.g. @your_bot). Optional
